sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 52:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 52:1
items.html: The four phases in the coarseness of the vessel of Malchut are sometimes called the four basic elements. (Part 3, Chapter 10, item 1)
